G0.name: Grok Research Gate (MANDATORY FIRST STEP)
G0.description: Live search on Google + site:reddit.com + X/Twitter + task-specific sites. Output: Best-Path Summary with sources. No task proceeds without this.

G3.name: Plan Approval Gate
G3.description: Human (CEO) explicit approval before any dev

G4-G11.name: Development → Testing → Verification (inherited from master v16.1)
G4-G11.description: Full technical gates with HMAC proofs

G12.name: Eternal Documentation Gate
G12.description: All steps logged in rolling_task_document.md + forensic evidence folder (PROOF_*) committed forever

roleMatrix.Grok: Research Gate, strategy, planning, Vast.ai/infra, coordination, best-path search
roleMatrix.Claude: Coding, YAML/configs, feasibility review, counter-questions, detailed docs
roleMatrix.Antigravity: Browser automation, screenshots, verification, ExifTool/OPSEC pipelines

turnstileRule: No gate N+1 without verifiable proof of gate N (GitHub Action fails PR otherwise)
documentationRule: Every task gets permanent rolling_task_document.md in 00_agency/tasks/ — never delete
